Work history

Experience

C
Data Analyst Trainee
Cedlearn
Hyderabad, India
Oct 2024 — Jan 2025
  • Collected, cleaned, and transformed 50,000+ records across 5+ datasets using SQL joins, CTEs, and window functions — reducing data preparation time by 35%.
  • Conducted end-to-end EDA using Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn), uncovering 10+ actionable patterns to support data-driven decision making.
  • Designed 3+ Power BI dashboards with 8+ DAX measures and KPI visuals — enabling 4 cross-functional stakeholders to monitor metrics 30% faster.
  • Built 4+ Excel analytical reports using Pivot Tables, Power Query, and XLOOKUP — cutting manual processing time by 40%.
  • Performed root cause analysis across 3+ datasets, producing 6+ insight reports improving accuracy by 20% for non-technical stakeholders.
  • Created 5+ Tableau dashboards with calculated fields and filters — improving comprehension by 25% through visual storytelling.
  • Engineered Scikit-learn ML pipelines for 2+ classification models, achieving 82% prediction accuracy to support business forecasting.
